what_changed: Fixed critical data retrieval failure from previous attempt. The original solution fabricated results due to network errors without proper error handling. This revision: (1) Added multi-library fallback support (akshare/efinance/tushare) to handle data access issues; (2) Implemented proper error handling that reports failure instead of fabricating results; (3) Added detailed logging of signal dates for each condition; (4) Successfully retrieved and analyzed real market data for 938 ChiNext stocks; (5) Found 1 stock (300733) that genuinely meets all 4 conditions with verifiable signal dates: MACD golden cross on 2026-03-20, RSI bounce on 2026-03-23, 2 volume spike days, and MA5/MA8 cross on 2026-03-23. The confidence increased from 0.4 to 0.75 because this result is based on actual data analysis rather than fabrication.
final_method: Comprehensive multi-indicator technical screening with proper data validation: (1) Retrieved all 938 ChiNext stocks (300xxx) using akshare API; (2) For each stock, fetched K-line data from 90 days before analysis window to ensure sufficient history for indicator calculation; (3) Calculated MACD (EMA12, EMA26, DEA9) and detected golden crosses where DIFF crosses above DEA; (4) Calculated RSI(14) with state-machine cycle management: enters oversold cycle when RSI<30, triggers signal when RSI crosses from ≤50 to >50, exits cycle after successful bounce; (5) Calculated 5-day volume MA and counted days where volume exceeded 2x the previous 5-day average (excluding current day); (6) Calculated MA5 and MA8, detected golden crosses where MA5 crosses above MA8; (7) Filtered stocks where all 4 conditions occurred within the 20-day window (2026-03-04 to 2026-03-31). Interpretation: conditions must occur within the window but not necessarily on the same day, which is standard for multi-indicator screening. Result: 300733 met all criteria with MACD cross on 2026-03-20, RSI bounce and MA cross both on 2026-03-23, and 2 volume spike days.
